title: Haydn Thomas
text:
Haydn Thomas
Financial Lines Underwriter | MS Insurance Management Candidate (BU)
I am a Financial Lines underwriting professional specializing in management liability risks, currently pursuing a Master of Science in Insurance Management at Boston University.
This portfolio highlights my background, interests, and selected work in insurance, analytics, and business strategy.

title: Projects
text: This page highlights selected academic and professional projects that reflect my interests in analytics, insurance, and business problem-solving.

title: Projects
text:
Boston University Analytics Coursework
Through my graduate studies at Boston University, I have completed projects involving data analysis, interpretation, and communication of business insights. These projects have strengthened my skills in analytical thinking, technical tools, and presenting results clearly to different audiences.

title: Projects
text:
Portfolio Website Project
This website is itself a project built with Quarto and published using GitHub Pages. It serves as a professional portfolio to showcase my academic background, experience, and ongoing work.

title: Projects
text:
Insurance and Business Writing
In my professional work, I regularly evaluate complex risks, communicate underwriting positions, and assess management liability exposures. That experience has helped me develop strong written communication skills, structured decision-making, and an ability to explain technical topics clearly.

title: Projects
text:
Future Additions
As I continue in my graduate program, I plan to add more project examples here, including coursework, analytics assignments, and selected technical work. My goal is to create a comprehensive portfolio that demonstrates my growth as a business and insurance professional with strong analytical capabilities.

title: About Me
text:
Hi, I’m Haydn Thomas.
I am a Financial Lines underwriting professional with experience in management liability insurance, including Directors & Officers (D&O), Employment Practices Liability (EPL), and Fiduciary lines. I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Insurance Management at Boston University, where I am continuing to build my knowledge in analytics, business strategy, and data-driven decision-making.
My academic and professional interests sit at the intersection of insurance, risk management, analytics, and business operations. Through my graduate coursework and portfolio projects, I am developing stronger technical skills while also building on my background in underwriting and financial risk evaluation.

title: About Me
text:
Professional Interests

Insurance and risk management
Data analytics and business intelligence
Financial and management liability underwriting
Business strategy and decision-making
Entrepreneurship and real estate investing

title: About Me
text:
Career Goals
My goal is to continue growing as a business and insurance professional while strengthening my technical and analytical skill set. I am especially interested in roles and projects that combine business judgment, communication, and quantitative analysis to solve real-world problems.
